item.title: Iran Made A Cartoon. It Was More Accurate Than The White House Press Briefing. Fucking Saturday Morning Foreign Policy.
item.description: Iran is releasing animated cartoons to explain the Strait of Hormuz situation to the President of the United States. MOTHERFUCKING CARTOONS. The Islamic Republic of Iran has concluded that the most effective way to communicate with the leader of the free world is SATURDAY MORNING ANIMATION. ??? And the devastating part? Bill Madden is RIGHT. You DO have to explain things to Trump the way you'd explain them to a six year old. This is the man who didn't know diesel and gasoline were different things. Who thought the F-35 was fine four hours before it got hit. CARTOONS ARE APPROPRIATE. ??? The cartoon shows Trump crying as oil prices spike, allies saying no, and Iran controlling the strait. Which is EXACTLY WHAT IS HAPPENING. The propaganda is just describing current events with slightly more colorful graphics than the Wall Street Journal. That's the truly f**king remarkable part. ?️?? Iran made a cartoon. Trump started the war. No allies showed up. The F-35 got hit. The diesel revelation happened. Club Hurmuz is apparently open for business. And somewhere Eisenhower is spinning in his grave generating enough electricity to power the cartoons. ???? #ClubHurmuz #IranCartoon #SaturdayMorningForeignPolicy #TrumpCartoon #HormuzStrait #NobodyShowedUp #DieselGate #F35 #EisenhowerWasRight #ExplainItLikeHes6
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Issues with end stage capitalism.
item.description: TLDR: Guy works for Coca-Cola for 35 years. Gets injured by faulty door at work and goes on leave. Coke uses a little known law to fire him without severance or benefits because it’s an “undue hardship on the company”. Union is fighting for him but maybe if the company catches some heat from the public, something will be done about it. (Hopefully the link works) https://www.cbc.ca/news/gopublic/go-public-coke-coca-cola-factory-injury-wcb-frustrated-empoloyement-disability-9.7133409
item.dc:creator: boxak

item.title: I think we’re done
item.description:
Foster mama cat Bobbie just had a marathon birth, getting all six kittens out in under three hours! I don’t think she has a seventh in there, but I’ll stick around for a while just in case.
Got their initial weights. Last one is the heaviest and number three - whose name is apparently Socks - is the runt. Mama and babies are doing splendidly!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: It. Is. HAPPENING!!
item.description: Been waiting over two weeks to post this, but my pregnant foster mama cat Bobbie is officially in labor!! Get ready for a billion posts as she gives birth! Six or seven kittens, coming up!

item.title: ICE is raping children in custody and denying them abortions.
item.description: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2026/mar/01/pregnant-immigrant-children-texas-abortion Then they refuse abortions to their rape victims. These girls aren't raping themselves. They don't keep the male and female populations mixed. Republicans are protecting the child rapists. Again.

item.title: PTDump: Random Memes with Powerful Auras
item.description:
Hello everyone! Have you been caressed lovingly by a clown today?
Ba-ZING
*smack*
@ElbowDeepInAGoblin
EEEEEWWWW
See my previous post for inspiration.
Buffletini please.
What he thinkin?
Well? Did she?
You need to s c r o N C H
I'm thinkin about thos popsicles
He cronchwrap my Blast Pouch till I Chalup.
Heavens to Betsy!
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
It's the powerhouse of the county fair.
Nor should any of you be.
Thanks for reading everyone! Swing by my gameplay channel later, too! Plus, if you have a channel (streaming, content, whatever) holler at me! I'd love to feature you in a future dump. youtube.com/@PTGDad
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad

item.title: SLAVA UKRAINA!
item.description: This dog was chained in Druzhkivka while people nearby fed him. When glide bombs, Shaheds, and artillery hit, people run. A chained dog cannot. Now he is safe with 12 Vartovykh. The video shows only seconds of the talk that made this rescue possible. Source: @perevaa.bsky.social

item.title: Maelle Cosplay by LittleLuckyCosplay
item.description:
My Maelle cosplay from Clair Obscur: Expedition 33. Photography by Jeff Jenkins taken at MegaCon Orlando 2026! There are Act 1 spoilers at the end of this post just a heads up!!
Act 1 spoilers in a few pics!
Last warning - spoilers are below!
These are my favorite shots but I have to bury them - I know the game has been out for almost a year but I still want to warn people!
item.dc:creator: LittleLuckyCosplay

item.title: Top Iranian official explains exactly how Trump fucked up
item.description: Top Iranian official drops a massive bombshell. He confirms diplomacy is completely dead because Trump intentionally used peace negotiations as a deception to launch surprise military strikes. Iran is now preparing for an existential war to the very end. Another fabulous win for Trump and the GOP...

item.title: We have contractions!!!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: We’re kinda sorta thinking about maybe getting close to kittens
item.description: I came home at lunch to feed my pregnant foster mama cat Bobbie and I noticed a little leakage coming from her. She’s very restless, keeps trying to groom (her belly is too big for her to reach!), keeps meowing at me and using the litter box constantly, and isn’t eating as much. She’s been doing this type of thing for days so it doesn’t really mean anything, but the goop coming out of her IS new. My supervisor is letting me telework the rest of today so I’ll be here one way or another! (Edit: a bunch of you have asked what probiotics I give Bobbie, and it’s FortiFlora for felines)
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Mama needed a little help
item.description: Bobbie seems a little overwhelmed and ran off with number one so I’ll do my part and help out number two. Gonna put her with mama now
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Well now I know who’s gonna be trouble
item.description: Came back from downstairs and saw this little one far from the herd. I’m 99% sure it’s number six. But he was very calm, no screeching, just checking out the world. He could be trouble…
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
